<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v1/scorings/precheck"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.precheck</b> authority for authenticated user

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["customer"],"properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"addresses. Only `PERMANENT` and `CONTACT` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"cartItemsRemoved":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total count of removed items form shopping basket during current shopping"},"cashlessTransactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cashless transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"cashlessTransactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"earliestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"oldest transaction date on partner e-shop"},"itemsViewed":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Number of viewed pages with products"},"latestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"newest transaction date on partner e-shop."},"pageReviewsTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website in review and comments sections (in seconds)"},"pageTotalTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website (in seconds)"},"transactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cash transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"transactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1CustomerExtraData"},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"object"}},"title":"KeyValue"}},"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name"},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer"},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name"},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number with country code (including leading `+`)"},"tin":{"type":"string","description":"tax identification number (ICO)"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestCustomer"}},"title":"FinancingV1ScoringPrecheckRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"*/*":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["id","recommendation"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identificator of Precheck. Send this identificator in ApplicationRequest for better approval rate."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Custom message for customer."},"recommendation":{"type":"boolean","description":"A recommendation of whether the order should be passed to the HCO. true = Application is likely going to be approved. false = Application is likely going to be rejected. "}},"title":"FinancingV1ScoringPrecheckResponse"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
